stemHtml: An aircraft with trailing edge flaps and leading-edge slats is flying at a speed close to the flap-limited stall speed when the flaps are extended to the landing configuration. The slats on the left wing remain retracted. If the speed is decreased, what are the possible consequences?

options.a: The right wing could stall when the slats are extended, after the extension of the trailing edge flaps.
options.b: The right wing could stall when the trailing edge flaps are extended and speed increases.
options.c: The left wing could stall when the slats are extended, after the extension of the trailing edge flaps.
options.d: The left wing could stall when the trailing edge flaps are extended and speed decreases.
